race.comment: Competitive. ON THE FULL (1) improved placing at York this distance and then didn't run out 1500m there following. Drops back in grade with a handy 3kg claim and has the numbers to go close in this company. PRETTY DEVINE (2) is speedy and disappointed 15 days ago at Narrogin (vet cleared). Placed at York prior and keeps a handy 3kg claim. She will use the inside gate and also has winning claims. GINGERIFFIC (8) resumed in stronger at Pinjarra and needed the run. Presently fitter and has shown enough to keep onside. ADDICTIVE DREAM (5) raced as the favourite at Dongara first up and wasn't far away. He has more to give and can get into the finish. PLAYFUL STAR (10) is also second-up and has a 2kg claim. Had switched yards and improved. The gate is awkward but expect him to be around the mark.
